author: Barış Kısır
short_description: When mythological creatures begin turning to stone across London, a disgraced occult investigator must uncover a conspiracy before the hidden world shatters.
title: The Concrete Chorus
long_description: Disgraced occult investigator Leo Ashworth is pulled from self-imposed exile when mythological creatures begin turning to stone across London — victims petrified in poses of terror. He joins forces with folklore scholar Dr. Mira Chandrasekhar and the ancient sphinx Cassia Verney, Keeper of the Accord, to uncover a conspiracy. The killer is wielding the Aegis of Perseus, a mythical artifact that channels a modified Gorgon's curse, and the attacks are claimed by the First-Born — a purist faction who believe creatures should rule humanity. Racing against a deadline that threatens every creature in London, Leo must confront his own past failure and redeem himself before the hidden world is shattered forever.
